narrative:
Richland Twp township has 519 registered voters, with 49.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.2 percentage points.
